titleStmt.title: SII 10.283: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu

No. 283. (A.R. No. 278 (a) of 1905.) ON A SLAB SET UP CLOSE TO THE PRĀKĀRA ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE CLOSED UP WESTERN ENTRANCE TO THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA TRIPURANTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1157. (Manmatha)

summary.p: States that a certain Vishaveli Masake-Sāhiṇi gave 25 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntakadēva, in commemoration of his having won the battle of Chintalapūṇḍi which he fought riding (the horse) Puṇyamūrti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1157 gu nēṁṭi manmathasaṁvatsara mā¨rgga
śira ba 2 budhavārānanu svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāmaṁḍalēśva
raṁ birudu nanuṁgudēvamahārājula tatpādapadmōpajīvi
svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmadativiṣamahayārū
ḍha prauḍharēkhārēvaṁta vīralakṣmīkāṁta gōtrapavitra baṁdhu
ciṁtāmaṇi parāṁganāputra gaṁḍaroḷugaṁḍa nuḍidaṁte
kadanapracaṁḍa Ayyanasiṁga sāhasōttuṁga śrīmanmahā
pasāyitaṁ rāyasāhiṇinārāyaṇa viṣavelikuṁ
ṭesāhiṇi koḍuku devai sāhiṇi koḍuku rāyasāhiṇi vi
ṣaveli masakesāhiṇi ciṁtalapūṁḍikayyānanu puṁṇya
mū¨rtti nekki gelici śrītripurāṁtakadēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpamu
na kiccina mōdālu 25 vīniṁ cēkoni pāseṁ brammana nitya ma 1
nēti lekkanuṁ dana putrunuṁ bautrika naḍapaṁgalavāṁḍu
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu . svadatta paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdhara śaṣṭi
¨rvvaruṣasahasrāṇi yiṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 10.283 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
